channel.title: Extension on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Extension on Arrans github.io

item.title: rossmoody/svg-gobbler
item.description: Open source browser extension for finding, editing, exporting, optimizing, and managing SVG content.

item.title: h2non/filetype
item.description: Fast, dependency-free Go package to infer binary file types based on the magic numbers header signature

item.title: kabachuha/sd-webui-text2video
item.description: Auto1111 extension implementing text2video diffusion models (like ModelScope or VideoCrafter) using only Auto1111 webui dependencies

item.title: dvcol/synology-download
item.description: Synology Download Station browser extension built with React.
